pins.faster_whisper: 1.1.1 (1.2.x replaced silero v5 split assets with silero_vad_v6)
pins.note: speaches pins its deps loosely; newer resolutions drift the API. All three pinned.

member_startup_fixes: PYTHONPATH not needed (speaches is pip-installed) but cwd + relative resources are
realtime-console/dist StaticFiles mount -> stub dir created in LOCALSTACK_HOME
ENABLE_UI=false -> skip the Gradio demo (breaks on installed gradio)
model_aliases.json -> stub {} in cwd (FileNotFoundError at transcription)
HF_HUB_CACHE=<localstack>/hf-cache/hub -> speaches reads the wizard-downloaded whisper
routing_fix: batch STT -> /upstream/speaches/v1/audio/transcriptions (URL routing), not :9098/v1 body-model (404 'no router for requested model')

batch_transcription.original_text: Hello from the on-box Qwen text to speech engine. This is a second sentence to force chunking. And a third for good measure.
batch_transcription.onbox_transcription: Hello, from the Unbox Quen Text-to-Speech Engine. This is the second sentence to force chunking. And the third, for good measure.
batch_transcription.quality: near-exact; only 'on-box Qwen' -> 'Unbox Quen' (homophone of a coined word). VAD (silero_vad_v5) processed 11.21s in 0.037s.

exclusive_group_swap: retrieval recovered (embeddings health=ok) after the audio group loaded whisper and swapped back
open: STREAMING STT (/ws/stt Design-B direct-to-:9099) not yet exercised end-to-end — batch validated; streaming is a follow-up (G4 streaming + G6 eviction safety).
benign speaches log: 'Unexpected streaming transcription response type: Transcription' — non-fatal, JSON returned correctly.
G5 (audio<->retrieval swap latency) + G6 (streaming-STT eviction safety) harnesses committed, unrun.
